name: AIA Owner-Contractor Agreements (A101 / A102 / A103 / A104 / A141)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check the chosen AIA Owner-Contractor agreement variant carries its mandatory articles, attachments, and complements AIA A201-2017 General Conditions (which is incorporated by reference into all of these).

variants_covered.A102-2017: Owner-Contractor, Cost-Plus with Guaranteed Maximum Price (CM at Risk / GMP)
variants_covered.A104-2017: Owner-Contractor, Abbreviated form for small projects
variants_covered.A141-2014: Owner-Design-Builder Agreement (with Exhibit A — Terms & Conditions)
